message:
fix(core): harden credential storage and arithmetic safety

Add path traversal prevention in credential storage to reject connector_ids
containing directory separators or traversal sequences. Replace panic-prone
unwrap_or patterns with checked_sub/checked_div in supervisor window
calculation and coverage computation. Improve file operation error
differentiation in lock store.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
